ticker_headline: PM Modi's Bihar post sparks political storm ahead of Bihar elections
blog_title: Bihar Buffs Activated: Modi Hits Rally Mode, Opposition Trips HQ Alarm
blog_content: In Rajneeti terms, this is classic high-level Rally play: one Modi post, and suddenly the whole Bihar map starts blinking red. The opposition, naturally, responds by fumbling Charisma checks and triggering an Arrest Event card. BJP gains momentum, media oxygen, and probably a tidy Fundraise bonus, while rivals waste turns on damage control. Moral of the campaign? In Bihar, never hand your opponent free outrage XP.
social_post: One post, one storm, and Bihar politics is back in full Rajneeti mode. Modi looks like he just played Rally + Charisma, while the opposition burned a turn on self-sabotage. Bihar election board: thoroughly entertained. #BiharElections #Modi #Rajneeti #IndianPolitics #ElectionStrategy
